references.text: [ErFr91] Erd\H{o}s, P. and Freud, R., On sums of a Sidon-sequence. J. Number Theory (1991), 196--205.

remarks.text: Erd\H{o}s and Freud \cite{ErFr91} proved\[\left(\frac{3}{8}-o(1)\right)N \leq f(N) \leq \left(\frac{1}{2}+o(1)\right)N,\]and note that it is closely connected to the size of the largest quasi-Sidon set (see [840]).

statement.text: Let $f(N)$ be maximal such that there exists $A\subseteq \{1,\ldots,N\}$ with $\lvert A\rvert=\lfloor N^{1/2}\rfloor$ such that $\lvert (A+A)\cap [1,N]\rvert=f(N)$. Estimate $f(N)$.
